mapper.select: select nt.id, nt.note_id as noteId, nt.tag_id as tagId, t.name as tagName from note_tags nt join tags t on t.id = nt.tag_id where nt.note_id = #{noteId} order by t.name asc

insert.if:
insert into note_tags (note_id, tag_id) values
(#{noteId}, #{tagId})
on conflict (note_id, tag_id) do nothing

mapper.select: select nt.tag_id as tagId, count(*) as count from note_saves ns join note_tags nt on nt.note_id = ns.note_id where ns.member_id = #{memberId} group by nt.tag_id
